name: Teller Levit & Silvertrust
description_short: Chicago-based law firm specializing in commercial creditors' rights, debt collection, and judgment enforcement for businesses of all sizes since 1920.
description_long:
Teller, Levit & Silvertrust is a commercial law firm established in 1920 with over 100 years of experience in creditors' rights and commercial debt collection. Based in Chicago, the firm serves businesses throughout Illinois, ranging from small local companies to Fortune 500 corporations, as well as national and multinational enterprises.

The firm represents commercial creditors seeking to recover outstanding receivables and debts. Their services encompass breach of contract claims, Uniform Commercial Code sales of goods disputes, insurance premium collection, professional fee recovery, freight collections, construction litigation, general commercial litigation, judgment enforcement, asset recovery, and citation procedures. They offer representation in negotiation, mediation, arbitration, and courtroom litigation, with emphasis on efficient and aggressive debt recovery strategies.

Teller, Levit & Silvertrust distinguishes itself through its specialized focus on commercial creditors' rights (not consumer debt), its century-long track record in the field, its experience handling multi-million-dollar corporate accounts, and its comprehensive approach that covers pre-judgment litigation through post-judgment enforcement. The firm emphasizes acting quickly and efficiently while adhering to proper legal procedures to avoid complications and maximize recovery amounts.

This is a niche legal practice serving business-to-business (B2B) creditors exclusively, not consumers or individuals seeking debt relief. The firm's model is fundamentally different from consumer-focused bankruptcy services—they represent creditors pursuing payment, not debtors seeking protection or relief from creditors.
pros: Over 100 years of continuous commercial law practice since 1920, providing deep expertise in creditors' rights
Serves Fortune 500 companies and national corporations, demonstrating capacity for complex, high-value accounts
Comprehensive post-judgment enforcement including asset recovery, citations, and garnishment procedures
Experience with specialized commercial claims including freight collections, insurance premium recovery, and UCC sales disputes
Offers multiple dispute resolution methods: litigation, mediation, and arbitration for flexible strategies
Five-star reviews noted on website, indicating client satisfaction
Direct contact via phone (312-922-3030) for immediate legal consultation
cons: Strictly B2B focused—does not serve individual consumers or personal debt situations
Only licensed and operating in Illinois; no multi-state presence mentioned
Website provides limited details on fee structures, contingency options, or cost transparency for potential clients
No information about typical case outcomes, success rates, or portfolio examples
Small website with limited detail on individual attorney credentials or specific cases handled
best_for: Commercial businesses and corporations with outstanding receivables owed by other businesses
Companies seeking aggressive collection and judgment enforcement in Illinois
Enterprises requiring litigation support for breach of contract or commercial disputes
diagnosis: Teller, Levit & Silvertrust is a specialized commercial creditors' rights law firm designed exclusively for businesses pursuing debt recovery, not for individual consumers or personal bankruptcy matters. The primary caveat is that this firm represents creditors collecting debts, not debtors seeking relief—and they operate only in Illinois.
services: Commercial debt collection and receivables recovery
Uniform Commercial Code (UCC) sales of goods claims
Insurance premium collection and deductible recovery
Commercial litigation (fraud, tortious interference, breach of fiduciary duty)
